name: Broker's Command Center
updateContentCommand: npm install && sudo -u postgres createuser -s vscode 2>/dev/null; sudo -u postgres createdb broker -O vscode 2>/dev/null; echo '✅ Dependencies installed'

postAttachCommand.db-setup: sudo -u postgres psql -c "ALTER USER vscode WITH PASSWORD 'vscode123';" 2>/dev/null; DATABASE_URL=postgresql://vscode:vscode123@localhost:5432/broker npx drizzle-kit push 2>/dev/null; DATABASE_URL=postgresql://vscode:vscode123@localhost:5432/broker npx tsx server/seed.ts 2>/dev/null; echo '✅ Database ready'
